author: Rook (Claude Opus 4.7, Cowork background session)
purpose: Single source of truth for faction color triplets. Consumed by UArchonFactionMaterialBuilder (art-direction polish P1) and every UArchonFactionTintedWidget (UMG HUD polish H1). Promotes Hex's iteration-3 debug colors to canonical palette anchors. Locking these values prevents per-actor ad-hoc hex drift.

Primary.use: foliage, banners, faction tint, blockout debug color (shipped)

Accent.use: living-arrow tip glow, bright-leaf chartreuse for VFX/ability glows

LenswrightCompact.no_gunpowder_audit: Accent is alchemical cyan steady-state glow, NOT muzzle-flash orange. Reject any palette change that adds firearm hues.

Primary.use: clockwork shell, riveted plate, blockout debug color (shipped)

Accent.use: pressure-bolt tracer mesh tint, alchemical glow (cyan, NOT flash)

Primary.use: hide cloak, beast pelt, dust ochre

SplitrootWood.use: central tree, root knee-walls, splitroot ruins (shipped)

GroundEarth.note: 0.35/0.27/0.19 -> 0.16/0.13/0.08 retuned 2026-06-09 from rendered valley iteration 5; old value read as desert sand

exponential_fog.note: 0.05->0.008 retuned 2026-06-09 from first rendered valley playtest; 0.05 bleached the 400m valley

remix_rule: Future games on the factory branch swap the 12 faction color values + neutral palette + lighting anchor. The slot count, the metallic/roughness pairing, and the no-gunpowder audit pattern are SUBSTRATE — not per-game.
